era: 1992-1998 core. Grunge/Indie. E=6 -- melodic, heavy, mid-energy. Fremont. Sub Pop. Portland-Seattle axis.

theory_nodes.concept: Portland-Seattle axis. Pond formed in Portland, moved to Fremont, signed to Sub Pop. The I-5 music corridor documented at degree 230.
theory_nodes.description: Portland origin to Seattle adoption via Sub Pop.

theory_nodes.concept: Charlie Campbell network: Pond + Brad + Satchel. Brad (Stone Gossard, Shawn Smith) connects Pond to one of the scene's most critically respected side projects.
theory_nodes.description: Multi-band network in the mid-decade Seattle web.

theory_nodes.concept: Second Fremont entry. Gas Huffer (228) = punk E=7. Pond (230) = grunge/indie E=6. The neighborhood's musical range bracketed.
theory_nodes.description: Fremont's two registers: comedic punk and melodic indie.

cross_references.relationship: First Fremont entry. E=7 punk. The neighborhood's louder register.
E=7 underground. Pond at E=6 is softer, more melodic, more structured.
E=6 continues. Frontier Records. Alt rock melodic middle.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=6+E=4=E=10. Perfect equilibrium. Both softer than their category suggests. Visitor/transplant parallel -- hawk from Arctic, band from Portland.
